title: UoT Annual Convocation Scheduled for December
content: The University of Turbat is pleased to announce that the annual convocation ceremony will be held in December.
The event will celebrate the achievements of graduating students, with distinguished guests and faculty in attendance.
Further details regarding registration, gown collection, and schedule will be published soon.

title: New Auditorium AV System Installed
content: A comprehensive audio-visual upgrade has been completed in the main auditorium, featuring high-fidelity sound and 4K projection.
The enhanced setup will support academic conferences, seminars, cultural events, and guest lectures.
Training sessions for staff and student societies will be scheduled in the coming weeks.

title: Fall Semester Midterm Schedule Announced
content: All departments have released their midterm assessment timetables for the Fall 2026 semester.
Students should consult their respective departments or the LMS for course-wise schedules and venues.
Any scheduling conflicts may be reported to the relevant department within the announced window.

title: Extended Library Hours for Exam Prep
content: To better support students during midterms, the central library will remain open until 10 PM.
Quiet study zones and group discussion rooms will be available on a first-come, first-served basis.
Please carry your student ID to access extended-hour services.

title: Student Tech-Expo 2026: Innovation at its Best
content: Over 50 student-led projects were showcased at the Tech-Expo 2026, drawing attention from local industry leaders.
The event fostered collaboration opportunities and highlighted the university's emphasis on innovation.
Award categories included Best Prototype, Social Impact, and People's Choice.

title: Inter-Departmental Sports Week Announced
content: The annual Inter-Departmental Sports Week will feature cricket, football, volleyball, and athletics events.
Students are encouraged to register via their departments. Detailed schedules will be circulated soon.
Prizes and trophies will be awarded to top teams and standout performers.

title: Breakthrough in Sustainable Agriculture Research
content: Faculty researchers have developed irrigation techniques tailored for arid regions, improving water efficiency.
The study emphasizes region-specific practices suitable for Balochistan's climate.
Pilot programs are being considered with local agricultural partners.

title: UoT Secures Grant for Water Quality Initiative
content: A multi-disciplinary team has secured funding to analyze and improve regional water quality.
The initiative will implement community-led monitoring and reporting tools.
Stakeholder workshops will be organized to share findings and gather feedback.

title: Career Development Workshops Announced
content: The Career Services Center will conduct workshops on CV building, interview skills, and networking.
Industry professionals will join to share insights and evaluate mock interviews.
Registration opens next week through the student portal.

title: New Electives in Data Science Introduced
content: The Computer Science department is offering new electives in Machine Learning and Data Visualization.
Courses are designed to be hands-on with real-world datasets and collaborative projects.
Enrollment caps apply; interested students should register early.

title: Tree Plantation Drive by Environmental Club
content: Over 300 saplings were planted across campus as part of the sustainability initiative.
Volunteers from multiple departments participated in the drive.
Follow-up maintenance schedules have been planned to ensure plant growth.

title: Journal Publication: Desert Climate Resilience
content: University scholars have published findings on infrastructure resilience to extreme desert temperatures.
The paper discusses materials and design approaches for long-term durability.
Collaborations are underway to test solutions in real-world conditions.
